commands: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund; else echo 'package.json not found in /app or /app/frontend' && exit 1; fi
if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm run build; else echo 'package.json not found in /app or /app/frontend' && exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run start; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm run start; else echo 'package.json not found in /app or /app/frontend' && exit 1; fi
